# Storybook

**[STUB]** Created from live event text; verify against wiki/source when available.

## Description

Upon pickup, add 1 Brightest Flame to your Deck.

## Notes

### Obtaining Storybook

At the start of Act 2, can be offered by Tezcatara.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Brightest Flame is high-tempo energy/draw, but repeated plays cost max HP; take when the deck converts burst turns and can manage the HP ceiling loss.
